---
title: "telemetry.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/live/telemetry.ts"
loc: 27
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.35
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 7.31
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Request](file://express)
- [Response](file://express)
- [SubspaceRelay](file://./socket.js)
- [recordPing](file://./recorder.js)
- [recordTrace](file://./recorder.js)
- [AgentPing](file://../types.js)

### Exports
- `normalizePath`
- `normalizePath`
- `handleTelemetryPing`
- `handleTelemetryPing`
- `ping`
- `handleTelemetryTrace`
- `handleTelemetryTrace`
- `trace`
